title: Keeping AI Under Control
modules: Why AI Safety Is Everyone's Problem
Who Is Working on AI Safety
What You Can Do Right Now
synopsis: AI safety is one of the most debated topics in tech, yet most people have never encountered a clear, jargon-free explanation of what it means. This course demystifies alignment, risk, and the global effort to keep powerful AI beneficial.
rationale: With a demand score of 6/10 and only 0.60 corpus similarity to the future-focused 'Previsión del Progreso en IA', an accessible AI safety course addresses a rapidly growing public interest that current curriculum leaves almost entirely unexplored.
